creator: sheldonh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The CD kits come with an installation booklet.  Take a look at it. :-) 

If you've lost the booklet or you borrowed the CDROM from a friend 
or for some other reason don't have the booklet, there's also 
quite a lot of help available at 

http://www.freebsd.org/projects/newbies.html#fbsd 

Should you continue to have difficulties, please read this article: 

http://www.lemis.com/questions.html
